report.title: 员工存贷款、中收业绩汇总表

select.value: select smy.EMP_ID ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,smy.EMP_NM ,smy.ORG_ID ,smy.ORG_NM ,smy.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,smy.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,smy.PSTN_TYPE ,smy.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,smy.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,smy.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,cf.YEAR ,cf.GRADE ,(coalesce(cf.YEAR,'')||coalesce(cf.GRADE,'')) as CERTI ,smy.CCY_ID ,smy.ADD_TIME ,og.HEAD_ORG_ID ,smy.DEP_BAL ,smy.DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_Q_PROFIT ,smy.LN_BAL ,smy.LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_Q_PROFIT ,mid.INCOME from( SELECT EMP_ID ,MEASURE_DT ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,CCY_ID ,ADD_TIME ,sum(coalesce(DEP_BAL ,0)) as DEP_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_Q_PROFIT ,0)) as DEP_Q_PROFIT ,sum(coalesce(LN_BAL ,0)) as LN_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT ,0)) as LN_Q_PROFIT FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_PROFIT_SMY smy WHERE MEASURE_DT={#MEASURE_DT#} and EMP_ID not like '1%' group by EMP_ID ,MEASURE_DT ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,CCY_ID ,ADD_TIME )smy inner join IBS.T5_ORG og on og.ORG_ID=smy.ORG_ID and og.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' %SQL% left join IBS.T5_EMP_CERTIFICATE cf on cf.EMP_ID=smy.EMP_ID left join IBS.T1_MIDDLE_BUSINESS_INCOME mid on mid.EMP_ID=smy.EMP_ID and mid.MEASURE_DT=smy.MEASURE_DT where {#condition#} order by smy.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,smy.ORG_ID ,smy.EMP_ID

option.source: @{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select DISTINCT EMP_ID, EMP_NM from IBS.T5_EMP WHERE {#matchcondition#}}
@{Select distinct PSTN_TYPE , PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE order by PSTN_TYPE, PSTN_TYPE_NM }
option.label: PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{select distinct SUB_PSTN_TYPE , SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM from ibs.T9_PSTN_TYPE where PSTN_TYPE='#PSTN_TYPE#' order by SUB_PSTN_TYPE }
option.label: SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID,BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID, ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('1','2') and BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID1#' and (HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or BRANCH_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY ORG_ID}
option.label: ORG_NM

condition.name: GRADE_Y_N
condition.label: 是否取得资格证
condition.value: (case when cf.GRADE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) = ('#data#')

option.source: @{select VALUE from IBS.T9_CERTIFICATE WHERE TYPE='Y' ORDER BY VALUE DESC}
option.label: VALUE

option.source: @{select VALUE from IBS.T9_CERTIFICATE WHERE TYPE='G' ORDER BY VALUE}
option.label: VALUE

report.title: 我的存贷款、中收业绩汇总

select.value: select smy.EMP_ID ,smy.MEASURE_DT ,smy.EMP_NM ,smy.ORG_ID ,smy.ORG_NM ,smy.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,smy.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,smy.PSTN_TYPE ,smy.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,smy.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,smy.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,cf.YEAR ,cf.GRADE ,(coalesce(cf.YEAR,'')||coalesce(cf.GRADE,'')) as CERTI ,smy.CCY_ID ,smy.ADD_TIME ,og.HEAD_ORG_ID ,smy.DEP_BAL ,smy.DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.DEP_Q_PROFIT ,smy.LN_BAL ,smy.LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,smy.LN_Q_PROFIT ,mid.INCOME from( SELECT EMP_ID ,MEASURE_DT ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,CCY_ID ,ADD_TIME ,sum(coalesce(DEP_BAL ,0)) as DEP_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_MTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_QTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as DEP_YTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(DEP_Q_PROFIT ,0)) as DEP_Q_PROFIT ,sum(coalesce(LN_BAL ,0)) as LN_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_MTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_QTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,0)) as LN_YTD_AVG_BAL ,sum(coalesce(LN_Q_PROFIT ,0)) as LN_Q_PROFIT FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_PROFIT_SMY smy WHERE {#condition#} group by EMP_ID ,MEASURE_DT ,EMP_NM ,ORG_ID ,ORG_NM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PSTN_TYPE ,PSTN_TYPE_NM ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,CCY_ID ,ADD_TIME )smy inner join IBS.T5_ORG og on og.ORG_ID=smy.ORG_ID and og.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' left join IBS.T5_EMP_CERTIFICATE cf on cf.EMP_ID=smy.EMP_ID left join IBS.T1_MIDDLE_BUSINESS_INCOME mid on mid.EMP_ID=smy.EMP_ID and mid.MEASURE_DT=smy.MEASURE_DT
